👥 Manage Users
Downloads a new index.html with all users baked in.
Replace the file on GitHub to make it permanent.
Bulk Import from CSV
CSV format: name,service,pin,depot,role
e.g. Alex Johnson,123456,1234,ROB,guard
Enter the guard's service number and set a new 4-digit PIN.

🔀 Route Change

Log a new train number and destination. Stops from the change station will unlock for time entry.

✏️ Edit Late Running Report

✂️ Trackwork — Truncate Route

Select the last stop in service. All stops after this point will be removed from the run sheet.

📝 Manual Run Sheet

Build a custom run sheet for trackwork or special workings. Add stops in order, or load a saved template.
📋 Saved Trackwork Templates
No stops added yet — add stops in order above
Tap a stop to remove it. Stops are added in the order you select them.
